brief_notes: Strong paper with all numbers verified: N=1,044/1,045, 14,027 genes, 14,029, 2,453 DEGs, all recovery ranges (95.6-98.5%, 56.6-90.7%, 90.3-97.4%, etc), FDR 11.4-18.5% CC, 575/214/382 DEGs, 368/96%, 214/56%, 30 exclusive, ECHO sample breakdown. Named citations (rubin1987multiple, vanbuuren2011mice, law2014voom, ritchie2015limma, benjamini1995controlling). Clear 6-step pipeline, good discussion.
